content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.6.1 / 5.6.3 WARN — RatingGateView.swift:20-25 routes 4-5 star users to a direct `itms-apps://…?action=write-review` link while diverting <4 star users to a private feedback form, and description.txt:2 says "rate us 5 stars!" — classic review-gating dark pattern.
Pierre: Apple prohibits filtering users by sentiment before the App Store prompt and requires the native `SKStoreReviewController.requestReview` API rather than custom star UI plus direct write-review URLs. Here happy users are sent to the store while unhappy ones are quietly funneled to an internal form, and the metadata explicitly solicits 5-star ratings. Replace the custom gate with `requestReview(in:)`, present it unconditionally, and remove the "rate us 5 stars" copy from the description.
